creator: eugene@zhegan.in
text:
net/samba4 port when building with he [x] DEVELOPER SUPPORT option still depends on the gdb751 binary, while 7.6 is in ports already, so samba4 fails to build, trying to install already installed gdb 7.6.

Fix: 

Edit the Makefile, change gdb751 string to gdb76.
How-To-Repeat: Try to install the net/samba4 port.
